title: Witch Hat - Heycronus
description: When you rename a carved pumpkin to "witch_hat", it transforms into a stylish witch hat
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/333b8071f73c2ac0b55dfb1e5c602b98a4dcf373.png)

🎃 Witch Hat 🧙‍♀️✨
 
Get into the Halloween spirit with this magical texture pack! 👻
When you rename a carved pumpkin to "witch_hat", it transforms into a stylish witch hat — perfect for spooky adventures and mystical builds! 🕯️💀
 
🧡 Features:
 
-Turn pumpkins into custom witch hats 
-Great for Halloween decorations or themed outfits 🕸️
-Requires OptiFine to work properly 🧩

![How to make](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/245ad0eb7c32078756619aa6d03b37ccf1781425.png)
